chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-606 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 26.09.2022 Mr. Bhagwan Das Bheel advocate for applicant along with applicant on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Imran Ali Abbasi, Assistant Prosecutor General. ----- Learned counsel after arguing at some length and failing to satisfy the court over merits of the case to grant him pre-arrest bail, for his failure to join investigation, as reflected in the impugned order, and the fact that in the challan section 334 PPC Itlaf-i-udwhas been added which is punishable for 10 years, does not press this application on merits and requests that he may be granted protective bail to surrender before the trial court. Learned Assistant PG has no objection to this proposal. Without touching the merits of the case, this application is converted into an application for protective bail and applicant is granted protective bail for 07 days from today to surrender before the trial court against same surety furnished by him in terms of order dated 18.05.2022. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of seven days on 02.10.2022 or on surrender of the applicant before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. Bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE
